guidelines: Use 'Alexandria' for all headings and body text to maintain a modern, elegant Arabic look.
CRITICAL (Arabic Typography): Do NOT use tight tracking (letter-spacing). Arabic script is cursive and tight tracking breaks the character connections.
CRITICAL (Arabic Typography): Always use generous line heights (leading-relaxed or leading-loose) as Arabic characters are taller and have more vertical diacritics.
Heading weights: Use font-semibold (600) or font-bold (700).
Body weights: Use font-light (300) or font-normal (400).
Light Theme: Use off-white (#FAFAF9) background. Cards/surfaces should be pure white (#FFFFFF) with a delicate 1px emerald/10 border.
Dark Theme: Use deep emerald-tinted black (#02120C) as background. Cards should be slightly lighter (#062218) with emerald/20 borders.
Gold Accents: Use the metallic gold (#D4AF37) for primary CTAs, hover states on cards, active tabs, and important icons.
Gradients: Use subtle Emerald to Deep Green gradients for hero backgrounds. Avoid harsh, highly saturated gradients. Use Gold gradients strictly for premium badges or special tool highlights.
Forbidden: Do not use generic Tailwind blue or indigo anywhere. Replace all default focus rings with gold or emerald.

global.spacing_system: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.

landing_page.hero: Centralized search bar, rich typography, subtle emerald abstract background texture, gold accent buttons.
landing_page.tools_grid: Bento-style or high-density CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4). Categorized by sections (Islamic, Finance, Health, etc.).

tool_cards: Must have an icon, title, and short description.
Hover effect: Translate-y slightly (-translate-y-1), increase shadow, border changes to gold.
Dark mode: Use subtle Glassmorphism (bg-emerald-950/40 backdrop-blur-md) with 1px emerald/20 border.
header: Contains: Logo (Right), Dark Mode Toggle (Left), Share Button (Left), Search Trigger.
footer: Text: 'جميع الحقوق محفوظه - برمجة وتصميم مطر الموايقي'.
Interactive: Clicking 'مطر الموايقي' MUST trigger the Contact Modal.
Contact Info block: Twitter (@edm2n) and Email (edm2n@msn.com).
buttons: Corner radius: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl (modern soft corners).
pwa_install: Floating action button or prominent header button: 'أضف للشاشة الرئيسية' (Add to Home Screen).

visual_enhancers.textures: Use CSS noise or subtle grain overlay on the dark theme to make it feel premium.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders generously to separate grid items instead of heavy shadows, creating a 'technical/directory' feel.

motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in for tool cards using Framer Motion (or simple CSS animations).
motion.modals: Scale-in and fade-in for the Contact Modal and tool calculators.

accessibility.data_testid: CRITICAL: Every interactive element (buttons, links, inputs, cards) MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='tool-card-bmi', data-testid='footer-contact-trigger').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure gold text on white background is dark enough (#CA8A04) to meet APCA contrast ratios. If not, use gold as background with dark text.

icons.instructions: For RTL, ensure direction-specific icons (like arrows) are flipped. Use 'transform scale-x-[-1]' if a specific RTL icon isn't available.

images.description: Emerald green abstract texture. Use with very low opacity (10-15%) overlay in the hero section to add premium depth.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: The entire application must be wrapped in a layout with `dir='rtl'`.
CRITICAL: Use Tailwind's logical properties (ps-, pe-, ms-, me-, start-, end-) instead of physical properties (pl-, pr-, ml-, mr-, left-, right-) to ensure perfect RTL support.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid`.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use robust grid systems.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., when a user copies a result or shares).
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., `* { transition: all }`). Target specific properties.
Ensure the Footer specifically handles the requirement to open a Contact Modal when clicking 'مطر الموايقي'.
